title: erucastrum varium f. montanum
intro: Erucastrum varium f. montanum, also known as alpine rocket, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, particularly used to treat digestive issues, such as nausea and bloating, due to its carminative and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Erucastrum varium f. montanum is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
